recommendations.title: Criminal Law

recommendations.title: Wer
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney begins to suspect that her client, who is charged with the murders of a vacationing family, might be more than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men
recommendations.overview: The defense and the prosecution have rested and the jury is filing into the jury room to decide if a young Spanish-American is guilty or innocent of murdering his father. What begins as an open and shut case soon becomes a mini-drama of each of the j

recommendations.title: Primal Fear
recommendations.overview: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. Vail finds himself up against his ex-pupil an

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Mea Culpa
recommendations.overview: A criminal defense attorney must choose between family, duty and her own dangerous desires when she takes on the case of an artist accused of murder.

recommendations.title: Results
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched personal trainers' lives are upended by the actions of a new, wealthy client.

recommendations.title: The Mauritanian
recommendations.overview: The true story of the Mauritanian Mohamedou Ould Slahi, who was held at the U.S military's Guantanamo Bay detention center without charges for over a decade and sought help from a defense attorney for his release.

recommendations.title: High Crimes
recommendations.overview: A female attorney learns that her husband is really a marine officer who has been AWOL for fifteen years and accused of murdering fifteen civilians in El Salvador. Believing her husband when he tells her that he's being framed as part of a U.S. Milit

recommendations.title: Fierce People
recommendations.overview: A massage therapist looking to overcome her addictions and reconnect with her son, whose father is an anthropologist in South America studying the Yanomani people, moves in with a wealthy ex-client in New Jersey.
